title: Service and repair bores and windmills
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Service and repair bores and windmills demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Establish bore history and workplace repair requirements

pcs.text: Review workplace records and confirm bore history
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review workplace records and confirm bore history?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review workplace records and confirm bore history.

pcs.text: Confirm workplace bore and windmill service and repair requirements with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm workplace bore and windmill service and repair requirements with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm workplace bore and windmill service and repair requirements with supervisor.

pcs.text: Obtain specialist instructions and assistance as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain specialist instructions and assistance as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain specialist instructions and assistance as required.

elements.title: Prepare to carry out service and repairs

pcs.text: Identify hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Select, check and maintain tools, equipment and materials required to perform bore and windmill service and repair
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and maintain tools, equipment and materials required to perform bore and windmill service and repair?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and maintain tools, equipment and materials required to perform bore and windmill service and repair.

pcs.text: Identify faulty or unsafe tools and equipment, and separate for repair or replacement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify faulty or unsafe tools and equipment, and separate for repair or replacement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify faulty or unsafe tools and equipment, and separate for repair or replacement.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Dismantle and strip windmill and bore installations according to manufacturer specifications and workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dismantle and strip windmill and bore installations according to manufacturer specifications and workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dismantle and strip windmill and bore installations according to manufacturer specifications and workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Service and repair bores, windmills, motors and pumps according to manufacturer specifications and workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Service and repair bores, windmills, motors and pumps according to manufacturer specifications and workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Service and repair bores, windmills, motors and pumps according to manufacturer specifications and workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Report complex faults and repairs and refer for specialist advice and remedial action
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report complex faults and repairs and refer for specialist advice and remedial action?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report complex faults and repairs and refer for specialist advice and remedial action.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Retrieve lost equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Retrieve lost equipment.
